title: Your Habits Are Broken (Here's Why)
description: You're consistent with habits but stuck on goals. Problem: they're not connected. Watch to see how turning isolated habits into a system changes everything. #Shorts #Habits #PersonalGrowth #SystemsThinking
hook_visual: Text overlay appearing over scattered habit icons (meditation, reading, work) that morph into an interconnected glowing loop. Bold text: 'You're doing habits. Not systems.'
end_screen_cta: Questions? Drop them below. And if this helped, follow for more on building systems that actually work.
